title: Golden Velvety Ethiopian Lamb Kik Alicha
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish featuring tender lamb in a rich and creamy sauce, made with salted butter and air-fried to perfection, this keto-friendly recipe is perfect for a special occasion or meal prep.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the berbere spice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Heat 2 tablespoons of salted butter in a large air fryer basket over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces to the air fryer basket and cook for 5 minutes, or until browned on all sides.
Remove the lamb from the air fryer and set aside.
In the same air fryer basket, add the remaining 2 tablespoons of salted butter, chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger.
Cook for 5 minutes, or until the onion is translucent and the garlic and ginger are fragrant.
Add the chicken broth and heavy cream to the air fryer basket and stir to combine.
Return the lamb pieces to the air fryer basket and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the lamb is tender.
